title: APT AI Review Bundle Reference
source: Extracted from applied-practical-thinking AI review bundle and review standard
expected_output: Evidence with file, path, or artifact references

severity_levels.critical: Blocks release or merge because it risks security, data, production, public trust, or irreversible drift.
severity_levels.high: Should be fixed before promotion because it creates significant user, support, architecture, or validation risk.
severity_levels.medium: Should be addressed soon or explicitly accepted because it weakens maintainability or consistency.
severity_levels.low: Improvement that does not block the current change.

minimum_evidence: Changed artifact path or reviewed input
guardrails: Do not invent doctrine that is not present in apt-principles.
Do not approve changes without evidence.
Do not rewrite product direction unless explicitly asked.
Flag ambiguity instead of silently guessing where risk is high.
